title: Microlicia longipedicellata
taxonomy: Microlicia longipedicellata is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is native to the tropical regions of South America. The classification of Microlicia longipedicellata is within the genus Microlicia, which is a part of the family Melastomataceae. This plant belongs to the Melastomatales order and is a member of the class Magnoliopsida. As a member of the Melastomataceae family, Microlicia longipedicellata is a dicotyledonous plant.
